Turn on Device Location
Your GPS is off. Enable it to see shops near you with accurate distances.
1
Open your phone's Settings app
2
Tap Location or Privacy → Location Services
3
Turn the Location / GPS toggle ON
4
Return here and tap "Try Again" below

About Founder
Nearby Founder Story
Pritam Rajput
Building Nearby to make local discovery feel real, verified and easy to trust.
20Age
05 Nov 2005DOB
Verified VisionTrust Focus
Founder Note
Hi, I’m Pritam Rajput, the founder of Nearby. I built Nearby to solve a real problem — finding genuine nearby services.
Pritam Rajput
Founder, Nearby
Real problem.
Real local trust.
Verified DataFocused on reducing fake and outdated listings.
User-FirstBuilt from real search pain faced by everyday users.
Trust GoalClear founder identity helps users feel safer using Nearby.
Why I Started Nearby
1
I built this app with one simple goal — to make life easier for people who move to new places.
2
When someone comes from a village to a city, or visits an unknown place, it becomes very difficult to find basic things like rooms, shops, banks, ATMs, restaurants, or hotels. Most of the time, people feel confused and waste a lot of time searching.
3
Nearby is created to solve this problem. With this app, anyone can easily find the services they need around them — quickly and without confusion.
4
At the same time, I also wanted to help small business owners. Many local shop owners struggle because people cannot find them easily. Through Nearby, they can list their business and reach more customers.
5
This way, both sides benefit — people find what they need, and shop owners grow their income.
6
For property, I created a separate section where buyers and sellers can connect directly, without any middleman or broker.
7
Nearby is not just an app. It is a small step towards making local discovery simple, honest, and helpful for everyone.
Mission for Nearby My mission is to build a platform where finding anything nearby feels easy, fast, and trustworthy.
Why This Builds Trust
When users know who is building the platform and what problem they are solving, it creates more confidence. Nearby is being shaped with a clear focus on authenticity, verified information, and a better experience for people searching around them.

ℹ️ About Nearby
📍
Nearby
Made with ❤️ in India
Why users trust Nearby
📍
Real GPS Distance
Every shop, room and property is sorted by your real GPS location. No fake ordering — nearest results always come first.
✓ OpenStreetMap Powered
🆓
100% Free — Hamesha
No listing fee, no subscription, no hidden charges. List your business or property completely free. No card required.
✓ Zero Commission
🔒
Safe & Verified Listings
Every listing shows the owner's phone number, location and verified badge. Report fraud or fake listings — action taken within 24 hours.
✓ Report System Active
⚡
Live Listings — Real Time
Rooms, properties and shops update in real time. When a new listing is added, you see it instantly — no refresh needed.
✓ Firestore Live Sync
🤝
Direct Contact — No Middleman
Talk directly to the shop owner or property seller — via WhatsApp or call. No broker, no commission, no waiting.
✓ Direct Connect
—

Free
Always
Live
